locations.name: Golden Hill
locations.notes: Base inicial favorita, 8-9 nodos de ore, cerca de misiones iniciales

locations.name: Desolate Church
locations.notes: Alternativa a Golden Hill, 8-9 nodos de ore

locations.name: Small Village
locations.notes: Merchant Lv12 para capturar, vende horns/pal organs/seeds/ladders

locations.name: Quartz+Sulfur early
locations.notes: 6 quartz + 9 sulfur, zona amplia, algo dificil de defender

locations.name: Mt. Obsidian quartz
locations.notes: 9-10 nodos de quartz puro, inexpugnable arriba de roca

locations.name: Sunlit Island
locations.notes: Mejor spot para Oil Extractor Lv50, 6 nodos de oil, cerca de spawn

locations.name: Feybreak beaches
locations.notes: Hexolite facil en playas, tambien en dungeons

locations.name: Sylva boss arena
locations.notes: 3 nodos de chromite en su arena (ruta A con Metal Detector)

locations.name: Sunbreak Isles base
locations.notes: Borde de acantilado, ~8 nodos soralita, faciles de defender

locations.name: Sunbreak Isles
locations.notes: Soralite Ingot schematic (Lv60), Jetragon spawn Lv70+

locations.name: Desert oasis fishing
locations.notes: Pescar Doom Tide Guild (sombra grande): ~50k gold, alpha ~100k

locations.name: Terraria Island fishing
locations.notes: Pescar Turturial Terra (medusas): decenas de miles, mas comun

locations.name: World Tree map
locations.notes: Desbloqueado via main story, Paldium/Palite + World Tree Bark

locations.name: Subterranean City Ruins
locations.notes: World Tree, 1hr duracion, artifacts/radiant gems/ancient spheres
